## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Scope matches issue/task
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] CI green (lint + tests + coverage)
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data in code/logs
- [ ] README/docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Risks/limitations documented

## QA Notes
- Local run steps:
- Evidence (test output/screenshots if needed):

## Risk
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High (explain)
